chapters.title: Staff, Clefs & Musical Notes
chapters.notes: Book pp 1-6. Foundational notation: intervals, musical notes (Do/Re/Mi naming), accidentals, staff/clefs (treble, bass, C clef variants), ledger lines, middle C in different clefs, ensemble staffs.

chapters.title: Musical Scales & Intervals
chapters.notes: Book pp 7-27. Includes Clarifying the Fretboard Visualization (book p 9), Major & Minor Scale on the Guitar Fretboard (p 14), Musical Intervals (p 16), Intervals on the Guitar Fretboard (p 19), Intervals Study (p 24).

chapters.title: Circle of Fourth / Circle of Fifth
chapters.notes: Book pp 28-32. Short chapter on circle-of-fourths / circle-of-fifths.

chapters.title: Chord Structures
chapters.notes: Book pp 33-176. Largest chapter. Sub-sections in TOC: Triads (p 34) with Chord Symbols (p 36), Basic Major & Minor Open String Chords (p 37), Chord Skeletons (p 38), Triads on the Fretboard (p 42), Inverted Triad Chords (p 47); Tetrad Chords (p 61) with Tetrads on the Fretboard (p 66); Suspended Chords (p 88) with Suspended on the Fretboard (p 90); Added Tone Chords (p 95); Extended Chords (p 105) with Extended Chord Skeletons (p 113), Tone Clusters (p 121), Extended Chords on the Fretboard (p 122), 9th Chords (p 123), 11th Chords (p 140), 13th Chords (p 151), Altered Chords (p 172).

chapters.title: Harmonic Fields & Scale Modes
chapters.notes: Book pp 177-186. Natural Major Harmonic Field (p 180), Natural Minor Harmonic Field (p 183), Scale Degree Chart (p 186).

chapters.title: How to Study the Harmonic Fields
chapters.notes: Book pp 187-222. Harmonic Field Tetrad & Extended Chords (p 188), Harmonic Fields on the Same String (p 192), First Harmonic Devices & Harmonic Field Chord Degree Possibilities (p 199).

chapters.title: Leading Tone & How Other Scales Appeared
chapters.notes: Book pp 223-292. Last content chapter. Harmonic Minor Scale Modes (p 225) with Harmonic Minor Tetrads & Extended Chords (p 229), Harmonic Minor Chord Family on the same String (p 233), Harmonic Minor Chord Degree Possibilities (p 240); Melodic Minor Scale Modes (p 251) with Melodic Minor Tetrads & Extended Chords (p 255), Melodic Minor Chord Family on the same String (p 259), Melodic Minor Chord Degree Possibilities (p 266); Harmonic Major Scale Modes (p 277) with Harmonic Major Tetrads & Extended Chords (p 281), Harmonic Major Chord Family on the same String (p 285), Harmonic Major Chord Degree Possibilities (p 292).
